title: FRIUSATE 6 Pcs Flannels Face Cloths Baby Washcloths Quick Dry Reusable Face Body Cloths Squares Wash Flannels for Baby Kids Adults(25x25cm)
features: Set: Contains 6 pure flannels face cloth , 4 colors in total, yellow*1, green*2, pink*1, blue*2, the size is about 25x25cm(10x10inch)

Material: The washcloth is made of bamboo fiber material, which has water absorption and skin-friendly properties. It meets various cleaning methods such as machine washing and hand washing, and is easy to dry. It is very suitable for home and travel use
Safe: These washcloths are soft, suitable for adults and children's skin, no allergic reactions, a must-have product for families

Multi-purpose: These muslin squares can not only be used as kids face towels, washcloths, bibs, bib butt cloths, sweat cloths, teething cloths, baby bath towels and baby pillowcases, but also can be used as makeup towels and travel towels

Multi-color: The face flannels set adopts the most popular colors on the market. Whether it is a boy or a girl, or an adult, you can find your favorite color. It has a light response and is a must-have product for home use
description: Product Description Quantity: 6 Pack Color: Yellow, Green, Pink, Blue material: Cotton +fiber Tips: In order to maintain the softness of the towel, try to wash the towel by hand Natural: Made of natural cotton material, it is very absorbent and soft, suitable for baby's skin Multi-purpose: It can be used as children's face towel, face towel, bib, bib butt cloth, knitted cloth, teething cloth, baby bath towel and baby pillowcase, and can also be used as cosmetic wipes and travel towel
